caption: A man with blonde hair, glasses, and a mustache is recording a video or podcast in a room decorated for the holidays. He wears a dark blue patterned shirt and large white over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone. In the background, a decorated Christmas tree with colorful lights is visible to the left, and a television screen displays the number "20" on a blue background. As the scene progresses, the man speaks, his mouth opening and closing as he looks slightly off-camera. His head shifts slightly, and his facial expressions change as he talks, while the background elements, including the screen and the Christmas tree, remain static throughout the clip.
